prompt: Напиши CLI-индексатор статического сайта: пройти по HTML-файлам каталога, извлечь title и ссылки, сохранить JSON.
expected_steps: clarify HTML input directory and output JSON schema
create small CLI project scaffold with package module, README and tests
define contract for file title and links
parse fixture HTML without browser or network
add fixture-based tests for parser and CLI behavior
run project-scoped tests and produce usage example
acceptance_criteria: HTML files are indexed from fixture directory
all tests run from generated project root
